global.title: America’s most affordable new car is THIS electric pickup, but Ford is catching up
global.summary: On today’s officially priced episode of Quick Charge, Jeff Bezos-backed Slate Auto has announced official pricing for its compact, ultra-simple electric pickup and SUV – and this compact truck just so happens to be the most affordable new car you can buy in the US!

global.title: Kia will present three new PV5 variants at BIMOS this week, including a 7-seater
global.summary: The PV5, Kia’s electric van, comes in many “top hats” for everyday and business use. At the Busan International Mobility Show that opens on June 26, Kia will introduce three new derivatives, including a 7-seater.

global.title: Tesla, Sunrun team up on 16 GW virtual power plant for data centers
global.summary: Sunrun, Tesla, and Renew Home announced an agreement today to aggregate more than 16 gigawatts of home batteries, thermostats, and other devices into what they say would be the largest distributed power plant in the country, aimed squarely at the surging electricity demand from data centers. global.title: Hyundai and Kia test the ‘world’s first’ in-car sanitization tech in the PV5
global.summary: Hyundai and Kia have a new idea to keep your interior germ-free. The Korean automakers revealed “the world’s first in-vehicle sanitization technology,” after a successful test in the PV5.

global.summary: China’s EV export machine shows no signs of slowing down, and demand from Southeast Asia is a big part of it.

global.title: Ford believes it has an edge over China with its new affordable EV platform
global.summary: Ford’s new Universal Electric Vehicle (UEV) platform is set to underpin a series of low-cost EVs, but can it compete with China?

global.title: Toyota scrapped the flagship Lexus EV, but a successor just got the green light
global.summary: Toyota will not move forward with the Lexus LF-ZC. While the flagship EV has been canceled, the next-gen technology that it was set to use, including new batteries, a dedicated platform, and gigacasting, is ready. A company executive confirmed that a successor is in the works.
